lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Outfitting planner used to verify the cargo-maximised trade fit, shielded vs unshielded tonnage, and laden jump range.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Cobra Mk III ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative optional-internal slot sizes (4·4·4·2·2·2·1·1) and hull mass used for the cargo and loadout tables.

sources.label: Inara — Cobra Mk III
sources.what: Stock hull price, small-pad requirement, and module-seller reference for outfitting the trade fit.

sources.label: Fandom — Cobra Mk III
sources.what: Manufacturer (Faulcon DeLacy), role profile, and lore reference for the trading assessment.
